productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Timeless Lifestyle Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and slightly distressed graphic print on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations If you are a die-hard motorbike rider and share the spirit of biking, then this T-shirt from wrangler is designed for you. Break free, get stylish in this blue tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfy all day. Team this with jeans or biker pants, biker gloves and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height:6' and shoulders:18”
